_comment: Minimum permission allowlist for ruflo-coordinated swarm sessions.
settings.local.json takes precedence over settings.json for local overrides.
Use jq or manually add these entries to your existing settings.local.json.
Run scripts/setup-swarm.sh to verify and auto-merge with jq if available.
IMPORTANT: bypassPermissions mode on spawned Agent() calls does NOT override
the session allowlist. The lead session must have these permissions active
before dispatching any coder agents, or agents will hit permission walls on
